product_depth.justification: Nine new sections across both files provide actionable, self-contained templates. EA: 6x6 Zachman matrix with cell-level artifacts, four sprint mapping strategies, FEAF five-model mapping with federal compliance integration (6 frameworks), three artifact templates, complete ADR template with lifecycle states, five-tool comparison, six diagram validation rules, workshop agenda with eight attendee roles and four workshop types. BA: seven-item interview checklist, five question categories with sample questions, three complete prioritization methods including full Kano 5x5 evaluation matrix, five-stage approval workflow with entry/exit criteria, four-step change control, nine-column traceability matrix with six completeness rules and four-type gap analysis.
product_depth.drift_check: Same as prior round. Both rounds add substantial domain-specific reference content that is independently verifiable.

No broken cross-references. Heading hierarchy sequential. Additions-only diff with zero modifications to existing content.

craft.justification: Sequential heading hierarchy. Consistent table formatting with aligned pipes. Markdown fences for code blocks. Horizontal rules between sections. Complex tables (6x6 Zachman, 5x5 Kano) render correctly. Template-focused structure over prose.

fitness_for_purpose.justification: All sections usable by generators and evaluators without external references. Templates include placeholder guidance. Decision tables provide actionable criteria. ADR template is copy-ready. Interview template is session-ready. Kano matrix provides lookup functionality. Traceability validation rules are automatable.
